[Termo_De_Quitacao_de_Debitos(1).html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/30320197/Termo_De_Quitacao_de_Debitos.1.html)
# gamesparaps5-ai.github.io<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Declaração de Quitação de Débitos</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&display=swap');

  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    background: #f0f4f8;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: flex-start;
    padding: 40px 20px;
  }

  .page {
    background: #ffffff;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 700px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
    padding: 36px 52px;
  }

  .header {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    border-bottom: 2px solid #5c2d91;
    padding-bottom: 16px;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .header img {
    height: 48px;
    object-fit: contain;
  }

  .header h1 {
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    color: #5c2d91;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .header .subinfo {
    font-size: 11px;
    color: #6b7a8d;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  .form-group { margin-bottom: 18px; }

  label {
    display: block;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.07em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: #6b7a8d;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }

  input[type="text"], input[type="number"], select {
    width: 100%;
    border: none;
    border-bottom: 1.5px solid #b0bec5;
    padding: 8px 2px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    color: #1a2533;
    background: transparent;
    outline: none;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
    border-radius: 0;
  }

  input:focus, select:focus { border-bottom-color: #5c2d91; }

  .row { display: flex; gap: 24px; }
  .row .form-group { flex: 1; }
  .row .form-group.narrow { flex: 0 0 160px; }

  .solicito {
    background: #f8f4fc;
    border-left: 3px solid #5c2d91;
    border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
    padding: 16px 20px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .solicito p { font-size: 13.5px; color: #3a4a5a; line-height: 2; }

  .solicito input[type="text"], .solicito input[type="number"] {
    border: none;
    border-bottom: 1.5px solid #5c2d91;
    width: auto;
    display: inline;
    font-size: 13.5px;
    padding: 0 4px;
    color: #5c2d91;
    font-weight: 500;
    min-width: 100px;
  }

  .aviso {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #6b7a8d;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }

  .data-section {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    align-items: flex-end;
    margin-bottom: 26px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .data-section span { font-size: 14px; color: #3a4a5a; white-space: nowrap; padding-bottom: 8px; }
  .data-section .form-group { margin-bottom: 0; min-width: 80px; }

  .assinatura-section {
    margin-top: 24px;
    padding-top: 20px;
    border-top: 1px solid #e0e6ed;
    display: flex;
    gap: 40px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .assinatura-block { flex: 1; min-width: 220px; }
  .assinatura-block label { margin-bottom: 24px; }
  .assinatura-line { border-bottom: 1.5px solid #b0bec5; margin-bottom: 8px; height: 28px; }
  .assinatura-desc { font-size: 12px; color: #6b7a8d; text-align: center; }

  .btn-row { margin-top: 24px; display: flex; gap: 12px; justify-content: flex-end; }

  button {
    padding: 10px 26px;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 7px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.15s;
  }

  .btn-print { background: #5c2d91; color: #fff; }
  .btn-print:hover { background: #4a2275; }
  .btn-clear { background: #e8edf2; color: #3a4a5a; }
  .btn-clear:hover { background: #d0d8e2; }

  @media print {
    @page { size: A4; margin: 10mm; }
    body { background: white; padding: 0; }
    .page { box-shadow: none; border-radius: 0; padding: 0; max-width: 100%; }
    .btn-row { display: none; }
    input, select { border-bottom-color: #888 !important; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="page">
  <div class="header">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Allp Fit">
    <h1>Declaração de Quitação de Débitos</h1>
    <div class="subinfo">
      AF Academia Itabuna &middot; Av. Princesa Isabel, 765 - São Caetano - Itabuna - BA - 45.607-291<br>
      CNPJ: 52.554.603/0001-39 &middot; coordenador.itabuna.ba@allpfit.com.br
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="row">
    <div class="form-group" style="flex:2">
      <label>Nome completo do aluno</label>
      <input type="text" id="nome" placeholder="Nome completo">
    </div>
    <div class="form-group narrow">
      <label>ID / Matrícula</label>
      <input type="text" id="id" placeholder="Ex: 12345">
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-group">
    <label>CPF do aluno</label>
    <input type="text" id="cpf" placeholder="000.000.000-00" inputmode="numeric" maxlength="14">
  </div>

  <div class="solicito">
    <p>
      Eu, acima identificado(a), declaro que estou ciente da quitação do meu débito no valor de R$&nbsp;
      <input type="text" id="valor" placeholder="0,00" style="min-width:80px;">,
      e por sua via me comprometo a partir de hoje assumir meus compromissos financeiros com a
      AF ACADEMIA ITABUNA, inscrita no CNPJ 52.554.603/0001-39. Declaro estar ciente que, caso ocorra
      um novo acúmulo de valores, os mesmos não serão perdoados, sendo cobradas as multas e encargos
      previstos no contrato assinado por mim no ato da matrícula.
    </p>
  </div>

  <div class="data-section">
    <span>Itabuna,</span>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label>Dia</label>
      <input type="text" id="dia" placeholder="__" maxlength="2" style="max-width:50px; text-align:center;">
    </div>
    <span>de</span>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label>Mês</label>
      <select id="mes" style="max-width:150px;">
        <option value="">selecione</option>
        <option>janeiro</option><option>fevereiro</option><option>março</option>
        <option>abril</option><option>maio</option><option>junho</option>
        <option>julho</option><option>agosto</option><option>setembro</option>
        <option>outubro</option><option>novembro</option><option>dezembro</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <span>de</span>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label>Ano</label>
      <input type="text" id="ano" placeholder="2025" maxlength="4" style="max-width:70px; text-align:center;">
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="assinatura-section">
    <div class="assinatura-block">
      <label>Assinatura do aluno</label>
      <div class="assinatura-line"></div>
      <div class="assinatura-desc" id="nome-display">_____________________________</div>
    </div>
    <div class="assinatura-block">
      <label>AF Academia Itabuna</label>
      <div class="assinatura-line"></div>
      <div class="assinatura-desc">CNPJ: 52.554.603/0001-39</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="btn-row">
    <button class="btn-clear" onclick="limpar()">Limpar</button>
    <button class="btn-print" onclick="window.print()">🖨 Imprimir / Salvar PDF</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  document.getElementById('nome').addEventListener('input', function() {
    const display = document.getElementById('nome-display');
    display.textContent = this.value || '_____________________________';
  });

  document.getElementById('cpf').addEventListener('input', function() {
    let v = this.value.replace(/\D/g, '').slice(0, 11);
    v = v.replace(/(\d{3})(\d)/, '$1.$2');
    v = v.replace(/(\d{3})(\d)/, '$1.$2');
    v = v.replace(/(\d{3})(\d{1,2})$/, '$1-$2');
    this.value = v;
  });

  const hoje = new Date();
  document.getElementById('dia').value = hoje.getDate();
  const meses = ['janeiro','fevereiro','março','abril','maio','junho',
    'julho','agosto','setembro','outubro','novembro','dezembro'];
  document.getElementById('mes').value = meses[hoje.getMonth()];
  document.getElementById('ano').value = hoje.getFullYear();

  function limpar() {
    ['nome','id','cpf','valor'].forEach(id => {
      document.getElementById(id).value = '';
    });
    document.getElementById('nome-display').textContent = '_____________________________';
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>
